evals.prompt: I'm building a SolidJS app with Zaidan. Create a settings form with full name, email address, and notification preferences. Include validation states.
evals.expected_output: A SolidJS component using Zaidan FieldGroup, Field, Switch/Checkbox or ToggleGroup as appropriate, class/for syntax, data-invalid/aria-invalid, semantic tokens, and gap spacing.
expectations: Uses SolidJS syntax: class, for, createSignal if state is needed, and event.currentTarget
Uses FieldGroup and Field for form layout
Uses data-invalid on Field and aria-invalid on invalid controls
Uses Switch or Checkbox for independent booleans and ToggleGroup only for segmented option sets
Uses gap-* instead of space-y-* or space-x-*
No React imports, className, htmlFor, useState, or lucide-react

evals.prompt: Create an edit profile dialog in SolidJS using Zaidan. Include avatar, name input, bio textarea, Save and Cancel buttons, and icons.
evals.expected_output: A SolidJS component with DialogTitle, AvatarFallback, lucide-solid icons, data-icon attributes, Kobalte as={Button}, and Zaidan form components.
expectations: Uses DialogTrigger as={Button} instead of asChild or render
Icons import from lucide-solid and use data-icon
No manual icon sizing classes inside buttons

evals.prompt: Create a SolidJS analytics card that shows an ECharts bar chart with loading state and percentage badges using Zaidan.
evals.expected_output: A SolidJS component with full Card composition, ChartContainer/ECharts options, Skeleton, Badge, semantic tokens, and no Recharts.
expectations: Uses ChartContainer and ECharts option objects instead of Recharts components
Uses full Card composition with CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent
Uses semantic color tokens and CSS variables like var(--chart-1)
